_comment: EXAMPLE infrastructure context for the no-database (HTTP) option. Host this file anywhere the n8n instance can GET it (a static file server, an S3/object URL, a GitHub raw URL, a tiny endpoint). Edit it in one place and every future alert analysis uses the current map. The workflow's node must output { context: "..." }. Easiest path: serve the pre-rendered 'context' string below and pass it straight through. If you prefer to keep structured rows, use the 'hosts' array and render it in a Code node (see dynamic-infrastructure-context.md).
context:
Infrastructure context:
- home lab: 3-node cluster on a flat /24, admin over a mesh VPN
- vector-db (10.0.0.20): vector database / knowledge bases [internal-only]
- postgres (10.0.0.21): application databases [internal-only]
- automation / n8n (10.0.0.22): workflow automation [only /webhook/* exposed via tunnel]
- siem / wazuh (10.0.0.30): SIEM manager, this analyzer's source [internal-only]
- active response disabled, monitoring only

hosts.name: home lab
hosts.role: 3-node cluster on a flat /24, admin over a mesh VPN
